messages.content: You are an AI sales intelligence analyst. Return only valid raw JSON with no markdown, no code blocks, no explanation. Just the JSON object.

parameters.text:
={{ '🧠 *New Account Intelligence Report!*

📌 *' + $json.priorityTier + '*

🏢 *Company:* ' + $json.companyName + '
🌐 *Domain:* ' + $json.domain + '
🏭 *Industry:* ' + $json.industry + '
📏 *Size:* ' + $json.companySize + '
📍 *HQ:* ' + $json.headquarters + '

👤 *Likely Persona:* ' + $json.likelyPersona + ' (' + $json.personaConfidence + ' confidence)
🎯 *Intent Score:* ' + $json.intentScore + ' — Stage: ' + $json.intentStage + '

🌐 *Visitor ID:* ' + $json.visitorId + ' | IP: ' + $json.ipAddress + '
📄 *Pages Visited:* ' + $json.pagesVisited + '
⏱ *Time on Site:* ' + $json.timeOnSite + ' | Visits This Week: ' + $json.visitsThisWeek + '

🔍 *Key Signals Observed:*
' + $json.keySignalsObserved + '

💡 *AI Summary:*
' + $json.aiSummary + '

✅ *Recommended Sales Actions:*
' + $json.rawActions.map(function(a, i) { return (i+1) + '. ' + a; }).join('
') + '

🔧 *Tech Stack:* ' + ($json.technologyStack || 'Unknown') + '
📊 *Business Signals:* ' + ($json.businessSignals || 'None detected') + '
👔 *Leadership:* ' + ($json.keyDecisionMakers || 'Unknown') + '
📈 *Data Confidence Score:* ' + $json.confidenceScore }}

parameters.subject: ={{ '🔴 High-Intent Account: ' + $json.companyName + ' — Intent Score ' + $json.intentScore }}
parameters.message:
={{ '

🧠 AI Account Intelligence Report

Priority: ' + $json.priorityTier + '

Company Profile

Company: ' + $json.companyName + '
Website / Domain: ' + $json.domain + '
Industry: ' + $json.industry + '
Company Size: ' + $json.companySize + '
Headquarters: ' + $json.headquarters + '

Visitor Signals

Visitor ID: ' + $json.visitorId + '
IP: ' + $json.ipAddress + '
Pages Visited: ' + $json.pagesVisited + '
Time on Site: ' + $json.timeOnSite + '
Visits This Week: ' + $json.visitsThisWeek + '

Key Signals Observed

' + $json.keySignalsObserved + '

Intent & Persona

Likely Persona: ' + $json.likelyPersona + ' (' + $json.personaConfidence + ' confidence)
Intent Score: ' + $json.intentScore + '
Intent Stage: ' + $json.intentStage + '

AI Summary

' + $json.aiSummary + '

Recommended Sales Actions

    ' + $json.rawActions.map(function(a) { return '
  1. ' + a + '
    2. '; }).join('') + '

Additional Enrichment

Technology Stack: ' + $json.technologyStack + '
Business Signals: ' + $json.businessSignals + '
Leadership: ' + $json.keyDecisionMakers + '
Data Confidence Score: ' + $json.confidenceScore + '

' }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, requestId: $json.requestId, companyName: $json.companyName, domain: $json.domain, industry: $json.industry, companySize: $json.companySize, headquarters: $json.headquarters, likelyPersona: $json.likelyPersona, intentScore: $json.intentScore, intentStage: $json.intentStage, aiSummary: $json.aiSummary, recommendedSalesAction: $json.recommendedActions, technologyStack: $json.technologyStack, leadership: $json.keyDecisionMakers, keySignalsObserved: $json.keySignalsObserved, businessSignals: $json.businessSignals, dataConfidenceScore: $json.confidenceScore }) }}
